channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年5月8日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 The map that keeps Burning Man honest #2 AlphaEvolve: Gemini-powered coding agent scaling impact across fields #3 Child marriages plunged when girls stayed in school in Nigeria #4 The Self-Cancelling Subscription #5 RaTeX: KaTeX-compatible LaTeX rendering engine in pure Rust #6 Valve releases Steam Controller CAD files under Creative Commons license #7 Indian matchbox labels as a visual archive #8 Boris Cherny: TI-83 Plus Basic Programming Tutorial (2004) #9 37x Speedup in Lattice Boltzmann Cylinder Flow #10 SQLite Is a Library of Congress Recommended Storage Format
